site.title: Sabro
site.tagline: A platform for the Syriac language

home.lede: Sabro is the home of a growing family of apps for the Syriac language. It begins with {app}.

meltho.heading: Meltho
meltho.body: A daily Syriac word game — six tries to find the hidden word. A new one every day, drawn from the lexicon.

library.heading: Every word, broken down
library.body: Browse each word Meltho has shown — its letters, sounds, root, and meaning, one at a time.

about.body: One hub, many apps: Sabro carries the shared identity, lexicon, and API the ecosystem is built on. More apps for the Syriac language will follow Meltho.

auth.signInHint: Sign in with your account to view this content.

account.title: Profile
account.signInRequired: Sign in to view your profile.
account.identityNote: Your name and email are managed by your sign-in account.

username.heading: Username
username.body: Change the username you sign in with.
username.label: New username
username.hint: Letters, digits and underscores; must start with a letter or underscore.

errors.invalid: That username isn't valid. Use letters, digits and underscores.
errors.unauthenticated: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.unavailable: Something went wrong. Please try again.

email.heading: Email
email.body: Change the email address for your account.
email.bodyCurrent: Your account email is {email}. Change it below.
email.label: New email
email.sentTo: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. Enter it below along with your current password.

errors.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.send_failed: Could not send the code. Check the address and try again.
errors.code_invalid: That code isn't correct or has expired.
errors.email_taken: That email is already in use.
errors.unauthenticated: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.unavailable: Something went wrong. Please try again.

security.heading: Password
security.body: Change the password you use to sign in.

errors.tooShort: Your new password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.sameAsCurrent: Your new password must be different from your current one.
errors.new_rejected: That password was rejected — try a longer or less common one.
errors.unauthenticated: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.unavailable: Something went wrong. Please try again.

preferences.heading: Preferences
preferences.body: These follow your account across every app in the ecosystem.

stats.heading: Meltho
stats.subtitle: Your daily word game
stats.empty: You haven't played Meltho yet. Your stats will appear here once you do.

leaderboard.optInBody: Compete on the longest Meltho streak. Choose how you appear and whether to join — you're off the board until you opt in.
leaderboard.displayNamePlaceholder: How you'll appear on the board
leaderboard.optInHint: A display name is required to appear.
leaderboard.saveError: Could not save. Please try again.
leaderboard.heading: Top streaks
leaderboard.subtitle: The longest Meltho streaks
leaderboard.optedInUnranked: Build a streak to climb the board.
leaderboard.notOptedIn: You're not on the leaderboard yet — opt in above to join.
leaderboard.empty: No streaks on the board yet — start one today.

session.heading: Session
session.body: Sign out of Sabro on this device.

delete.heading: Delete account
delete.body: Permanently delete your account, your profile, and your game history. This also removes your sign-in identity and cannot be undone.
delete.error: Could not delete your account. Please try again.

translations.title: Translations
translations.signInRequired: Sign in to browse the translations.

segments.heading: Segments
segments.empty: This source has no segments yet.

library.title: Word library
library.heading: Meltho word library
library.lede: Every word Meltho has shown, with its letters and sounds.
library.ledeCount: so far — every word Meltho has shown, with its letters and sounds. A new one arrives each day.
library.empty: No past words yet — check back after today's puzzle.
library.loadFailed: Could not load the word library.
library.notFound: This word is not in the library yet.
library.searchPlaceholder: Search a word, meaning, or transliteration…

composition.heading: Letter by letter
composition.hint: reads right to left, like the word
composition.none: Add a vocalized form to this word to see its letters broken down.

rule.computedHard: hard at the start or after a vowelless letter (computed)

admin.adminRequiredHint: Sign in with an editor account to manage the lexicon.

lexicon.title: Lexicon backoffice
lexicon.subtitle: Manage the Syriac lexical database and the Meltho word pool.
lexicon.empty: No lexicon entries yet. Create the first one.
lexicon.saveFailed: Could not save the entry. Check the highlighted fields.
lexicon.actionFailed: The action could not be completed.
lexicon.deleteConfirm: Delete this entry permanently? This cannot be undone.

form.syriacUnvocalizedHint: Required. Base text without vowel points.
form.sblTransliterationHint: Optional enrichment; does not gate publication.
form.transliterationVariantsHint: Comma-separated accepted spellings for search tolerance.
form.meaningsHint: English, French and Dutch are all required to publish.
form.playableLengthHint: Counted from the unvocalized form. The Meltho pool accepts 2–8 letters.

lifecycle.heading: Lifecycle
lifecycle.publishHint: Publishing requires English, French and Dutch meanings.
lifecycle.poolHint: Only published entries of 2–8 letters can join the Meltho pool.
